title: tassadia decalepis
intro: Tassadia decalepis, also known as Indian pennywort, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the Western Ghats of India. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antispasmodic activities. The health benefits of Tassadia decalepis include reducing anxiety and stress, improving cognitive function, and aiding in the management of diabetes and hypertension. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and decoctions, to leverage its medicinal properties and health benefits.
